name: Kenneth Werner Quass — death and burial (1982)
researcher_question: When and where did Kenneth Werner Quass die, and where was he buried?
notes: Death and burial stripped from the starting tree; the agent must recover them by searching records (Texas death certificate via Ancestry, three FamilySearch death indexes) and the Find A Grave memorial. Death in Texas (Grapevine, Tarrant Co.) but burial back in Minnesota (Madelia) near family — the agent must recover both, including the geographically separate burial. The Find A Grave and Ancestry captures are bundled in provided-documents/ (the FS tools can't reach those sites). The subject is well-anchored by parents, spouse, children, and census residences, giving a strong search starting point.
